kept.title: Planning Anything with Rigor: General-Purpose Zero-Shot Planning with LLM-based Formalized Programming
kept.reason: LLM tool-use for formalizing and solving planning as optimization problems, aligning with structured reasoning for code/plans.

kept.title: Divide and Translate: Compositional First-Order Logic Translation and Verification for Complex Logical Reasoning
kept.reason: Neurosymbolic LLM method for translating NL to formal logic, verified by SAT solver for complex reasoning.

kept.title: Procedural Knowledge in Pretraining Drives Reasoning in Large Language Models
kept.reason: Analyzes LLM reasoning strategies, specifically procedural knowledge for math tasks, related to structured reasoning for code.

kept.title: MathCoder2: Better Math Reasoning from Continued Pretraining on Model-translated Mathematical Code
kept.reason: Generates code to enhance mathematical reasoning, aligning with structured reasoning for code correctness.

kept.title: Chain-of-Action: Faithful and Multimodal Question Answering through Large Language Models
kept.reason: Proposes Chain-of-Action for LLM QA with reasoning-retrieval, multi-source actions, and faith scoring for hallucination reduction.

kept.title: Monitoring Latent World States in Language Models with Propositional Probes
kept.reason: Probes extract structured propositions from LM internals; could monitor code-related reasoning states for faithfulness.

kept.title: Multi-modal Agent Tuning: Building a VLM-Driven Agent for Efficient Tool Usage
kept.reason: Builds VLM-based agent for tool usage; data synthesis for reliable tool-usage reasoning.
